title: elatine texana
intro: Elatine texana, also known as water-witch or Texas elatine, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America, particularly in Texas and other parts of the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Elatine texana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of using Elatine texana include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Elatine texana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
